Name: Volume for AirPlay Sonos
Author: Danila Pisarev

Actions.Name: Volume Up
Actions.Tooltip: Increase the volume of a Sonos speaker

Actions.Name: Volume Down
Actions.Tooltip: Decrease the volume of a Sonos speaker

Actions.Name: Play / Pause
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle play/pause on a Sonos speaker

Description: Control any Sonos speaker on your network from Stream Deck — including one playing an AirPlay stream. Three keys are included: Volume Up and Volume Down, each redrawn live with the speaker's real volume (a large percentage, direction chevrons, and a fill bar that turns a stacked Up/Down pair into one continuous gauge), and Play / Pause, which shows a play glyph when idle and a pause glyph while playing and skips to the next track on a double-press. Speakers are auto-discovered on your local network, so you just pick one from a dropdown — no Sonos account, app, or IP hunting required (manual IP entry is available as a fallback). Every key stays in sync on a short poll loop, so the volume and playback state stay correct even when changed from the Sonos app or another source. Configurable volume step (1-10%), bar side (left or right), and per-key percentage visibility. Works over the local Sonos API; no cloud, login, or third-party service involved. Not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Sonos, Inc. or Apple Inc.; 'Sonos' and 'AirPlay' are trademarks of their respective owners.
